title: Kirov, Kirov Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kirov, Kirov Oblast: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kirov is a city in Kirov Oblast with a population of 470,000. A historic city on the Vyatka River, known for its traditional Dymkovo toys, the Uspensky Monastery, and a rich craft heritage.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
